get_operating_mode.Get operating mode: Payload to get operating mode configurations

get_post_filter.Get post filter: Payload to get post filter configurations

set_operating_mode.Set operating mode: Payload to set operating mode configurations
set_operating_mode.Profile setting: Payload to set operating mode profile type
set_operating_mode.Access operations: Payload to set the required access operations
set_operating_mode.Radio start/stop conditions: Payload to set inventory start and stop conditions
set_operating_mode.Select settings: Payload to set select pre-filters parameters
set_operating_mode.Query and select settings: Payload to set query and select parameters
set_operating_mode.Tag metadata settings: Payload to enable/disable tag metadata to be reported

set_post_filter.Filter tags using prefix: Payload to filter tags using prefix
set_post_filter.Filter tags using regex: Payload to filter tags based on regex
set_post_filter.Filter tags using suffix: Payload to filter tags using suffix

set_os.No authentication HTTP: Payload to initiate firmware update with no authentication
set_os.Pre-installed CA certificate HTTPS: Payload to initiate firmware update with pre-installed CA certificate content
set_os.Inline CA certificate HTTPS: Payload to initiate firmware update with inline CA certificate content

reboot.Reboot device: Payload to perform a device reboot

get_endpoint_config.Active endpoint config: Payload to get active endpoint configuration details with all saved endpoint names
get_endpoint_config.Specific endpoint config: Payload to get the specified endpoint configurations

set_wifi.Create WPA2 personal: Payload to create a new WiFi profile with WPA2 Personal security
set_wifi.Modify WPA2 personal: Payload to modify an existing WiFi profile password
set_wifi.Set preferred AP: Payload to set an access point as preferred
set_wifi.Create WPA2 enterprise TLS: Payload to create a WiFi profile with WPA2 Enterprise using TLS authentication and certificates
set_wifi.Create WPA2 enterprise TTLS: Payload to create a WiFi profile with WPA2 Enterprise using TTLS authentication and CA certificate
set_wifi.Create WPA2 enterprise PEAP: Payload to create a WiFi profile with WPA2 Enterprise using PEAP authentication and CA certificate
set_wifi.Create WPA3 enterprise TLS: Payload to create a WiFi profile with WPA3 Enterprise using TLS authentication and certificates
set_wifi.Create WPA3 enterprise TTLS: Payload to create a WiFi profile with WPA3 Enterprise using TTLS authentication and CA certificate
set_wifi.Create WPA3 enterprise PEAP: Payload to create a WiFi profile with WPA3 Enterprise using PEAP authentication and CA certificate

config_endpoint.Add MGMT endpoint for MQTT TLS: Payload to add a new management endpoint configuration with MQTT TLS protocol
config_endpoint.Add control endpoint for MQTT TLS: Payload to add a new control endpoint configuration with MQTT TLS protocol and security parameters
config_endpoint.Add data endpoint: Payload to add a new data endpoint configuration
config_endpoint.Add MDM endpoint: Payload to add a new MDM endpoint configuration
config_endpoint.Add control endpoint: Payload to add a new control endpoint with publish/subscribe topics
config_endpoint.Add data endpoint for MQTT TLS: Payload to add a new data endpoint configuration with MQTT TLS protocol and security parameters
config_endpoint.Delete endpoint: Payload to delete an existing endpoint configuration
config_endpoint.Update endpoint: Payload to update an existing endpoint configuration with modified parameters

config_events.Enable all events: Payload to enable all event types with threshold configuration
config_events.Selective events: Payload to selectively enable/disable specific event types

delete_wifi_profile.Delete wifi profile: Payload to delete a saved WiFi profile

delete_wifi_profile_response.Successful deletion: Response when WiFi profile is successfully deleted
delete_wifi_profile_response.Cannot delete active SSID: Error response when attempting to delete an active/connected WiFi profile
delete_wifi_profile_response.SSID not found: Error response when the specified WiFi profile SSID is not found on the device

set_config.Create wifi profile: Payload to create a new WiFi profile with WPA2 Personal security
set_config.Modify wifi profile: Payload to modify an existing WiFi profile and set as preferred
set_config.Add mdm endpoint: Payload to add a new MDM endpoint configuration with reboot setting
set_config.Add data endpoint: Payload to add a data endpoint configuration with MQTT parameters
set_config.Add control endpoint: Payload to add a control endpoint with publish/subscribe topics
set_config.Complete config setup: Payload to set complete configuration with WiFi and management endpoint

delete_certificate.Delete wifi ca cert: Payload to delete a WiFi CA certificate from the device
delete_certificate.Delete mqtt client cert: Payload to delete an MQTT client certificate from the device
delete_certificate.Delete filestore ca cert: Payload to delete a filestore CA certificate from the device

install_certificate.MQTT certificates with certificate authe: Payload to install MQTT certificates using CA certificate
install_certificate.Filestore certificate with certificate a: Payload to install filestore CA certificate
install_certificate.MQTT certificates without authentication: Payload to install MQTT client certificates without authentication via HTTP
install_certificate.WiFi certificates without authentication: Payload to install WiFi certificates without authentication via HTTP
install_certificate.WiFi CA certificate using direct content: Installing WiFi CA certificate, where certificate content is provided as part of API
install_certificate.Server certificate: Payload to install server certificates with authentication
install_certificate.MQTT CA certificate install: Installing MQTT CA certificate, where certificate content is provided as part of API

installCertificate.Install certificate payload accepted: Install certificate response indicating the command payload is accepted
installCertificate.Url missing for HTTP source: Error response when URL is missing for HTTP source
installCertificate.Certificate content missing for direct s: Error response when certificate content is missing for direct source

get_wifi.WPA2 Personal connection: Response with WiFi connected to WPA2 Personal network
get_wifi.WPA2 Enterprise connection: Response with WiFi connected to WPA2 Enterprise network with certificates
get_wifi.WPA3 Enterprise connection: Response with WiFi connected to WPA3 Enterprise network with advanced security
get_wifi.WiFi interface disabled: Response when WiFi interface is disabled on the device

get_version.Device version info: Response with device serial, model, SKU and firmware version details

get_status.Device status info: Response with current device status including battery and connection details

get_config.Complete device config: Response with complete device configuration including all settings

get_current_region.Current region info: Response with current device region configuration

get_installed_certificates.Installed certificates list: Response with list of all installed certificates

get_eth.Ethernet config info: Response with ethernet interface configuration details
get_eth.Ethernet interface disabled: Response when ethernet interface is disabled on the device

alert.Battery alert: Alert indicating battery status such as low or critical battery level
alert.Network alert for WiFi: Alert indicating network events when WiFi connected
alert.Network alert for ethernet: Alert indicating network events when ethernet connected

alert_short.Battery critical set: Alert indicating battery level is critically low
alert_short.MQTT CA certificate download success: Notification indicating successful MQTT CA certificate download
alert_short.MQTT CA certificate install success: Notification indicating successful MQTT CA certificate installation
alert_short.WiFi client certificate download success: Notification indicating successful WiFi client certificate download
alert_short.WiFi client certificate install success: Notification indicating successful WiFi client certificate installation
alert_short.Filestore client key download fail: Notification indicating failure in filestore client key download

epConnection.Connected event: Event indicating the device has established a connection
epConnection.Disconnected event: Event indicating the device has lost the connection

Data Events.Tag data event: Tag data published in batches(max 40 tags per batch)
Data Events.Tag data with additional details: Tag data event including EPC, TID, channel, peak RSSI, phase, seen count, MAC, and hostname
Data Events.Tag events for access operations: Tag data events that include results of specified access operations such as read/write to memory banks
